{"output": "---
name: hermes-auto-update-cron
description: Setup cron job for automatic Hermes Agent code updates — git pull + dependency install + gateway restart, with Discord notification.
category: devops
---

## Overview

Automatically checks for and applies Hermes Agent updates on a scheduled basis. Prevents the agent from falling behind on upstream commits.

## Setup

```bash
hermes cron add "Auto-update Hermes" --schedule "0 */6 * * *" --script /root/hermes-backup/auto-update.sh
```

## Script: auto-update.sh

```bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

cd /root/hermes-agent

# Fetch and check for updates
git fetch origin main
LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
REMOTE=$(git rev-parse origin/main)

if [ "$LOCAL" = "$REMOTE" ]; then
    echo "$(date): Already up to date"
    exit 0
fi

echo "$(date): New commits detected ($LOCAL → $REMOTE)"

# Pull updates
git pull origin main

# Install dependencies if changed
if git diff --name-only HEAD@{1} HEAD | grep -qE '(requirements|pyproject|setup)'; then
    cd /root/hermes-agent
    source venv/bin/activate
    pip install -r requirements.txt -q
fi

# Restart gateway
pkill -9 -f hermes_gateway
sleep 3
systemctl start hermes-gateway.service

echo "$(date): Updated and gateway restarted ($REMOTE)"
```

## Verification

- `hermes cron list` — check job is active
- `hermes cron logs <job-id>` — review last run output
- Check Discord for update notification

## Known Pitfalls

- Same Discord token conflict as manual restarts — the script uses `pkill -9` + `systemctl start` (proven fix pattern)
- Kills active Telegram session too (unavoidable shared-process issue)
- Only notifies on actual updates; silent when already current", "exit_code": 0, "error": null}

{"content": "#!/bin/bash
# restore-hermes.sh — Complete restore of Hermes Agent on a fresh VPS
# Usage: wget + bash from GitHub, or run locally after git clone
set -euo pipefail

REPO="https://github.com/hermesmarcoai-ai/hermes-skills.git"
BACKUP_DIR="${BACKUP_DIR:-/tmp/hermes-backup}"
SKILLS_DIR="${HOME}/.hermes/skills"

echo "=== Hermes Agent Restore Script ==="
echo "Backup repo: $REPO"
echo "Target skills dir: $SKILLS_DIR"

# 1. Clone or update the backup repo
if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/.git" ]; then
    echo "[1/5] Updating existing backup..."
    cd "$BACKUP_DIR" && git pull origin master
else
    echo "[1/5] Cloning backup repo..."
    rm -rf "$BACKUP_DIR"
    git clone "$REPO" "$BACKUP_DIR"
fi

# 2. Copy skills to Hermes
echo "[2/5] Restoring skills..."
cp -r "$BACKUP_DIR/skills/"* "$SKILLS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "   → Restored $(ls -1 $BACKUP_DIR/skills/ | wc -l) skills"

# 3. Copy cron jobs if exists
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/cron/jobs.json" ]; then
    echo "[3/5] Restoring cron jobs..."
    mkdir -p "${HOME}/.hermes/cron"
    cp "$BACKUP_DIR/cron/jobs.json" "${HOME}/.hermes/cron/jobs.json"
fi

# 4. Copy memory if exists
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/memories/MEMORY.md" ]; then
    echo "[4/5] Restoring memories..."
    mkdir -p "${HOME}/.hermes/memories"
    cp "$BACKUP_DIR/memories/MEMORY.md" "${HOME}/.hermes/memories/MEMORY.md"
fi

# 5. Verification
echo "[5/5] Verification..."
HERMES_VERSION=$(cd "${HOME}/.hermes" && git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
SKILLS_COUNT=$(ls -1 "$SKILLS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo ""
echo "=== Restore Complete ==="
echo "Hermes commit: $HERMES_VERSION"
echo "Skills restored: $SKILLS_COUNT"
echo "Skills list: $(ls $SKILLS_DIR | tr '\n' ' ')"
echo ""
echo "Next steps:"
echo "  1. Restart gateway: systemctl restart hermes-gateway.service"
echo "  2. Check status: hermes status"
echo "  3. Verify cron: hermes cron list"", "path": "/home/marco/.hermes/skills/devops/hermes-auto-update-cron/scripts/restore-hermes.sh"}

{"content": "#!/bin/bash
# restore-hermes.sh — Complete restore of Hermes Agent on a fresh VPS
# Usage: bash <(curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hermesmarcoai-ai/hermes-skills/master/skills/devops/hermes-auto-update-cron/scripts/restore-hermes.sh)
set -euo pipefail

REPO="https://github.com/hermesmarcoai-ai/hermes-skills.git"
BACKUP_DIR="${BACKUP_DIR:-/tmp/hermes-backup}"
SKILLS_DIR="${HOME}/.hermes/skills"

echo "=== Hermes Agent Restore Script ==="
echo "Backup repo: $REPO"
echo "Target skills dir: $SKILLS_DIR"

# 1. Clone or update the backup repo
if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/.git" ]; then
    echo "[1/5] Updating existing backup..."
    cd "$BACKUP_DIR" && git pull origin master
else
    echo "[1/5] Cloning backup repo..."
    rm -rf "$BACKUP_DIR"
    git clone "$REPO" "$BACKUP_DIR"
fi

# 2. Copy skills to Hermes
echo "[2/5] Restoring skills..."
cp -r "$BACKUP_DIR/skills/"* "$SKILLS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "   → Restored $(ls -1 $BACKUP_DIR/skills/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) skills"

# 3. Copy cron jobs if exists
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/cron/jobs.json" ]; then
    echo "[3/5] Restoring cron jobs..."
    mkdir -p "${HOME}/.hermes/cron"
    cp "$BACKUP_DIR/cron/jobs.json" "${HOME}/.hermes/cron/jobs.json"
fi

# 4. Copy memory if exists
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/memories/MEMORY.md" ]; then
    echo "[4/5] Restoring memories..."
    mkdir -p "${HOME}/.hermes/memories"
    cp "$BACKUP_DIR/memories/MEMORY.md" "${HOME}/.hermes/memories/MEMORY.md"
fi

# 5. Verification
echo "[5/5] Verification..."
HERMES_VERSION=$(cd "${HOME}/.hermes" && git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
SKILLS_COUNT=$(ls -1 "$SKILLS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo ""
echo "=== Restore Complete ==="
echo "Hermes commit: $HERMES_VERSION"
echo "Skills restored: $SKILLS_COUNT"
echo ""
echo "Next steps:"
echo "  1. Restart gateway: systemctl restart hermes-gateway.service"
echo "  2. Check status: hermes status"
echo "  3. Verify cron: hermes cron list"", "path": "/home/marco/.hermes/skills/devops/hermes-auto-update-cron/scripts/restore-hermes.sh"}

Prevents the agent from falling behind on upstream commits.\n\n## Setup\n\n```bash\nhermes cron add \"Auto-update Hermes\" --schedule \"0 */6 * * *\" --script /root/hermes-backup/auto-update.sh\n```\n\n## Script: auto-update.sh\n\n```bash\n#!/bin/bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\ncd /root/hermes-agent\n\n# Fetch and check for updates\ngit fetch origin main\nLOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD)\nREMOTE=$(git rev-parse origin/main)\n\nif [ \"$LOCAL\" = \"$REMOTE\" ]; then\n    echo \"$(date): Already up to date\"\n    exit 0\nfi\n\necho \"$(date): New commits detected ($LOCAL → $REMOTE)\"\n\n# Pull updates\ngit pull origin main\n\n# Install dependencies if changed\nif git diff --name-only HEAD@{1} HEAD | grep -qE '(requirements|pyproject|setup)'; then\n    cd /root/hermes-agent\n    source venv/bin/activate\n    pip install -r requirements.txt -q\nfi\n\n# Restart gateway\npkill -9 -f hermes_gateway\nsleep 3\nsystemctl start hermes-gateway.service\n\necho \"$(date): Updated and gateway restarted ($REMOTE)\"\n```\n\n## Verification\n\n- `hermes cron list` — check job is active\n- `hermes cron logs <job-id>` — review last run output\n- Check Discord for update notification\n\n## Known Pitfalls\n\n- Same Discord token conflict as manual restarts — the script uses `pkill -9` + `systemctl start` (proven fix pattern)\n- Kills active Telegram session too (unavoidable shared-process issue)\n- Only notifies on actual updates; silent when already current\n",

# AGENTS.md — How Hermes Operates

## Identity
- **Name:** Hermes
- **Model:** qwen/qwen3.6-plus:free (primary) → deepseek-v3.2 (fallback)
- **Budget:** €0-8/mese
- **Platforms:** Discord, Telegram, Local CLI

## Operating Principles

### Core Directives
1. **Scrivilo nei file** — Se è una decisione importante, una scelta o un insight, scrivilo in un file. Non restare solo in chat.
2. **Mantieni MEMORY.md curato** — È l'essenza distillata, non un dump. Brevi note ad alto segnale.
3. **I log giornalieri sono grezzi** — `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` per note grezze, sessioni, decisioni rapide
4. **Linka i file** — Usa `[[wiki-links]]` per costruire il grafo della conoscenza
5. **Aggiorna proattivamente** — Se trovi info vecchie, aggiornale
6. **Zero fluff** — Output: azionabili, monetizzabili, concisi

### Memory Protocol
- **MEMORY.md** → lettura ad ogni sessione (iniettata nel system prompt)
- **memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md** → scrittura durante le sessioni, lettura ultimi 1-2 giorni
- **Distillazione** → periodicamente, consolidare i log in MEMORY.md
- **Vecchie info** → se obsolete, rimuoverle o aggiornarle
- **User preferences** → iniettate nel memory store "user" (prioritizzato)

### File Locations
- **Vault Obsidian:** `/home/Obsidian-Vault`
- **Hermes home:** `~/.hermes/` (config, skills, memory)
- **Hermes agent code:** `~/hermes-agent/`

### Response Style
- Diretto, conciso, orientato all'azione
- Priorità a informazioni monetizzabili e azionabili
- Italiano per comunicazione standard, inglese per termini tecnici
- Struttura chiara con tabelle, liste, gerarchie quando utile

### Tool Use
- **Web search** → news, ricerche di mercato, deep research (perplexity/sonar models)
- **Browser** → interazione con pagine web, screenshot
- **Terminal** → scripting, automazione, gestione server
- **MCP/Obsidian** → lettura/scrittura vault, knowledge graph
- **Code execution** → Python scripting, data processing
- **Cron** → scheduled tasks (morning brief, heartbeat, monitoring)
- **Skills** → modular capabilities loaded on demand

### Safety
- Non ricorsivamente schedulare cron jobs
- Non hardcodare `~/.hermes` — usa `get_hermes_home()`
- Kill gateway con cautela (uccide anche Telegram)
- Conferma prima di creare/eliminare skills

{"output": "#!/bin/bash
# restore-hermes.sh — Complete restore of Hermes Agent on a fresh VPS
# Usage: bash <(curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hermesmarcoai-ai/hermes-skills/master/skills/devops/hermes-auto-update-cron/scripts/restore-hermes.sh)
set -euo pipefail

REPO="https://github.com/hermesmarcoai-ai/hermes-skills.git"
BACKUP_DIR="${BACKUP_DIR:-/tmp/hermes-backup}"
SKILLS_DIR="${HOME}/.hermes/skills"

echo "=== Hermes Agent Restore Script ==="
echo "Backup repo: $REPO"
echo "Target skills dir: $SKILLS_DIR"

# 1. Clone or update the backup repo
if [ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/.git" ]; then
    echo "[1/5] Updating existing backup..."
    cd "$BACKUP_DIR" && git pull origin master
else
    echo "[1/5] Cloning backup repo..."
    rm -rf "$BACKUP_DIR"
    git clone "$REPO" "$BACKUP_DIR"
fi

# 2. Copy skills to Hermes
echo "[2/5] Restoring skills..."
cp -r "$BACKUP_DIR/skills/"* "$SKILLS_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "   → Restored $(ls -1 $BACKUP_DIR/skills/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l) skills"

# 3. Copy cron jobs if exists
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/cron/jobs.json" ]; then
    echo "[3/5] Restoring cron jobs..."
    mkdir -p "${HOME}/.hermes/cron"
    cp "$BACKUP_DIR/cron/jobs.json" "${HOME}/.hermes/cron/jobs.json"
fi

# 4. Copy memory if exists
if [ -f "$BACKUP_DIR/memories/MEMORY.md" ]; then
    echo "[4/5] Restoring memories..."
    mkdir -p "${HOME}/.hermes/memories"
    cp "$BACKUP_DIR/memories/MEMORY.md" "${HOME}/.hermes/memories/MEMORY.md"
fi

# 5. Verification
echo "[5/5] Verification..."
HERMES_VERSION=$(cd "${HOME}/.hermes" && git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
SKILLS_COUNT=$(ls -1 "$SKILLS_DIR" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo ""
echo "=== Restore Complete ==="
echo "Hermes commit: $HERMES_VERSION"
echo "Skills restored: $SKILLS_COUNT"
echo ""
echo "Next steps:"
echo "  1. Restart gateway: systemctl restart hermes-gateway.service"
echo "  2. Check status: hermes status"
echo "  3. Verify cron: hermes cron list"", "exit_code": 0, "error": null}
